userGuide.title: User Guide
userGuide.subtitle: Master the system with ease and simplicity.
userGuide.description: Designed for everyone. Follow the step-by-step instructions and clear button labels to get started.
userGuide.slowDown: Take it slow. Following each step carefully ensures the best results.
userGuide.basicSteps: How to make your first certificate
userGuide.contactAdmin: Contact your administrator or person in charge. Please specify your current screen and the task you're trying to perform.

step1.title: Explore Overview & Navigation
step1.description: Once logged in, you can quickly start your work via the Quick Actions board or the Left Navigation Bar. Select the corresponding function to begin.

notes.single: Button 1: Single Issuance - For manually issuing to individuals.
notes.template: Button 2: Create New Template - Design certificate layouts online.
notes.bulk: Button 3: Batch Issuance - Use Excel files for mass issuing.

step2.title: Single Issuance (Manual)
step2.description: This feature allows you to quickly issue a certificate to a specific student by entering information directly into the form.

notes.clickButton: On the Dashboard or Sidebar, click the 'Issue Single' button.
notes.fillInfo: The system will redirect you to the template selection interface.
notes.selectTemplate: Make sure you have a designed template ready before proceeding.
notes.confirm: If no template exists, go back to 'Create New Template' to design one.

step3.title: Select Certificate Template
step3.description: On this screen, you will see a list of pre-designed templates. Selecting the correct template ensures the information is printed accurately.

notes.viewTemplate: Carefully check the preview image and template name (e.g., Scholarship Certificate 2026).
notes.clickSelect: Click directly on the certificate template card to start filling in the issuance details.

step4.title: Enter Details & Complete
step4.description: This is the final step for the system to record data and generate the official certificate for the recipient.

notes.fillForm: Fill in all required fields (Decision, Reference Number, Full Name, ID, etc.).
notes.checkPreview: Double-check if the content matches the template preview on the right before confirming.
notes.submit: Click 'ISSUE SINGLE CERTIFICATE' and wait a moment for the system to process data.

notes.text: Certificates: Manage and track all issued certificates.
Issuance Batches: View and organize groups of certificates by session.
Official Decisions: Reference university award decisions and legal records.

tips: Smooth Operations: Please be patient and allow the system to process after each click. A brief pause ensures your data is synchronized accurately.
Stay Alert for Notifications: In case of an issue, the system will provide guidance through color-coded alerts. Reading these carefully will help you resolve errors in an instant.
Verification is Key: Taking a step back to review your information on the previous page will give you more confidence before officially publishing your certificate.
Security First: Always log out of your account after finishing your session, especially on public devices, to protect your certificate management rights.
Personal Identity: Double-check your identifying information (Full Name, Email) before clicking 'Confirm'. Once a certificate is digitally signed, any changes will require a full re-issuance process.
Optimal Display: The system is best viewed on Chrome or Edge browsers. If you encounter display issues, try refreshing the page by pressing Ctrl + F5.

templates.title: Certificate Templates
templates.subtitle: Design and manage your certificate layout templates.
templates.createSubtitle: Set up template details, upload background, and design layout.
templates.noDataSub: Create your first template to start designing certificates.
templates.nameRequired: Please provide a template name in the Settings tab.
